selection_evidence: weights and top10 selected on 2026-07-06..07, tested once on 2026-07-08..10, then frozen before the 2026-07-11 release
training_data_statement: Original AceGuard multiseed rank ensemble of three independently initialized permutation-invariant hand-set networks trained only on miner-visible public Poker44 benchmark releases through sourceDate 2026-06-30. Fixed weights 0.4/0.3/0.3 and top10 were selected on July 6-7 and confirmed once on July 8-10 before the July 11 release. Unlabeled miner payloads through 2026-07-05T23:59:59Z were used only for train/live KS feature filtering. No competitor implementation or weights, private labels, identities, cards, outcomes, wallets, hotkeys, IP addresses or private data were used.
